title: Gregory Strong
text: Home * People * Gregory Strong Gregory Strong , an American professional software developer, Chess enthusiast, and author of ChessV [1] , an open source engine that plays over 50 chess variants with various board sizes, as well as Orthodox Chess [2] . He is further working on a chess engine dubbed Quadrox [3] [4] .
